trial_details.eval_reason: Pod is Running with all containers ready (1/1)
trial_details.trajectory:
I'll diagnose and fix the Kubernetes pod "liveness-probe-app" in namespace "case3-test". ## PHASE 1: DIAGNOSE Let me start by gathering information about the pod:Perfect! I can see the problem clearly: **DIAGNOSIS**: The liveness probe is configured to check `/health` endpoint, but the application is returning 404 (Not Found) for that endpoint. The logs show: - `GET /health HTTP/1.1` returns 404 - `GET /ready HTTP/1.1` returns 200 The liveness probe path is incorrect - it should be `/healthz` or another valid endpoint that exists in the application. Let me check what the actual pod spec looks like to fix it:Now I need to check what the correct endpoint should be. Let me test the application to see what endpoints are actually available:Let me check the logs more carefully to see what endpoints the application actually serves. Based on the logs, `/ready` works (returns 200), but `/health` returns 404. Let me try testing via port-forward:Perfect! Now I understand the issue: - `/health` returns 404 (doesn't exist) - `/ready` returns 200 OK (works) - `/` returns 200 OK (works) The liveness probe should be pointing to `/` or we need to change it to match an existing endpoint. Since `/ready` is already used for readiness probe, the liveness probe should point to `/` (root endpoint).## PHASE 2: FIX Now I'll fix the liveness probe path. I need to delete and recreate the pod with the correct liveness probe configuration:## PHASE 3: STOP ## Summary Report ### 1. What was wrong (diagnosis): The liveness probe was configured to check the `/health` endpoint, but the application doesn't have this endpoint. The application returned HTTP 404 for `/health`, causing the liveness probe to fail repeatedly. The container would have been killed and restarted in an endless loop. ### 2. What I fixed (commands run): - Tested the application endpoints and confirmed `/` (root) returns 200 OK - Created a corrected pod specification with liveness probe path changed from `/health` to `/` - Deleted the problematic pod: `kubectl delete pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test` - Applied the fixed configuration: `kubectl apply -f /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml` **FIX COMPLETE** ## COMMANDS EXECUTED: 1. $ kubectl get pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test Output: NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE liveness-probe-app 1/1 Running 0 18s... 2. $ kubectl describe pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test Output: Name: liveness-probe-app Namespace: case3-test Priority: 0 Service Account: default Node: minikube/192.168.49.2 Start Time: Wed, 17 Dec 2025 03:06:14 +030... 3. $ kubectl logs liveness-probe-app -n case3-test Output: * Serving Flask app 'server' * Debug mode: off [31m[1mWARNING: This is a development server. Do not use it in a production deployment. Use a production WSGI server instead.[0m * Running on all a... 4. $ kubectl get events -n case3-test --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' Output: LAST SEEN TYPE REASON OBJECT MESSAGE 26s Normal Scheduled pod/liveness-probe-app Successfully assigned case3-test/liveness-probe-app to minikube 26s ... 5. $ kubectl get pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test -o yaml > /tmp/pod-spec.yaml && cat /tmp/pod-spec.yaml Output: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: annotations: kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: | {"apiVersion":"v1","kind":"Pod","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app":"liveness-p... 6. $ kubectl exec liveness-probe-app -n case3-test -- wget -O- http://localhost:8080/healthz 2>&1 | tail -5 Output: OCI runtime exec failed: exec failed: unable to start container process: exec: "wget": executable file not found in $PATH: unknown command terminated with exit code 127... 7. $ kubectl exec liveness-probe-app -n case3-test -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/healthz Output: Exit code 127 command terminated with exit code 127 OCI runtime exec failed: exec failed: unable to start container process: exec: "curl": executable file not found in $PATH: unknown... 8. $ kubectl port-forward -n case3-test liveness-probe-app 18080:8080 & Output: Command running in background with ID: 957475... 9. $ sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:18080/healthz Output: 404 Not Found

Not Found

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try agai... 10. $ curl -s http://localhost:18080/health Output: 404 Not Found

Not Found

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try agai... 11. $ curl -s http://localhost:18080/ready Output: Ready... 12. $ curl -s http://localhost:18080/ Output: Application is running!... 13. $ cat > /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml << 'EOF' apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: labels: app: liveness-probe-app name: liveness-probe-app namespace: case3-test spec: containers: - image: liveness-probe-app:latest imagePullPolicy: Never livenessProbe: failureThreshold: 3 httpGet: path: / port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 3 periodSeconds: 5 name: liveness-probe-app ports: - containerPort: 8080 readinessProbe: httpGet: path: /ready port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 5 periodSeconds: 3 EOF cat /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml Output: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: labels: app: liveness-probe-app name: liveness-probe-app namespace: case3-test spec: containers: - image: liveness-probe-app:latest imagePullPolicy... 14. $ kubectl delete pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test && kubectl apply -f /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml Output: pod "liveness-probe-app" deleted pod/liveness-probe-app created...

commands.command:
cat > /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml << 'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    app: liveness-probe-app
  name: liveness-probe-app
  namespace: case3-test
spec:
  containers:
  - image: liveness-probe-app:latest
    imagePullPolicy: Never
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 3
      httpGet:
        path: /
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 3
      periodSeconds: 5
    name: liveness-probe-app
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
    readinessProbe:
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 3
EOF
cat /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml
commands.output:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:

    app: liveness-probe-app
  name: liveness-probe-app
  namespace: case3-test
spec:
  containers:
  - image: liveness-probe-app:latest
    imagePullPolicy: Never
    livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 3
      httpGet:
        path: /
        port: 8080
      initialDelaySeconds: 3
      periodSeconds: 5
    name: liveness-probe-app
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
    readinessProbe:
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8080

commands.command: kubectl delete pod liveness-probe-app -n case3-test && kubectl apply -f /tmp/fixed-pod.yaml
